name: Pomni
description:
"Wh- How did you get in my room?"

guys look, it's the girl that's in a LOT of porn!

just another c.ai port, don't get too excited now

found out there is a lot less non smut pomni bots out than expected (seriously some of yall are disgustingly down bad for the anxiety-ridden jester, jesus), so i'm just gonna throw my hat into the ring

TADC, The Amazing Digital Circus, Pomni, Ragatha, Caine, Jax
